paper_metadata.title: GPT-4 Technical Report
paper_metadata.abstract: We report the development of GPT-4, a large-scale, multimodal model which can accept image and text inputs and produce text outputs. While less capable than humans in many real-world scenarios, GPT-4 exhibits human-level performance on various professional and academic benchmarks, including passing a simulated bar exam with a score around the top 10% of test takers. GPT-4 is a Transformer-based model pre-trained to predict the next token in a document. The post-training alignment process results in improved performance on measures of factuality and adherence to desired behavior. A core component of this project was developing infrastructure and optimization methods that behave predictably across a wide range of scales. This allowed us to accurately predict some aspects of GPT-4's performance based on models trained with no more than 1/1,000th the compute of GPT-4.

extraction_data.innovation: Used as a comparison point for GPT-4's performance.
extraction_data.application: Chatbots, content generation, and various language tasks

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 is a large multimodal model accepting image and text inputs, exhibiting human-level performance on various professional and academic benchmarks. It utilizes techniques like Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for alignment.
extraction_data.application: Chatbots, content generation, and various language tasks

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 significantly reduces hallucinations relative to previous GPT-3.5 models.
GPT-4 is a large language model that demonstrates zero-shot task transfer and improved performance on various exams.
GPT-4 is a large language model that demonstrates zero-shot task transfer and improved performance on various exams, further refined with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF).
GPT-4 demonstrates increased performance in reasoning, knowledge retention, and coding compared to previous models, presenting new safety challenges.
GPT-4-launch exhibits safer behavior due to safety mitigations applied, including reduced prevalence of harmful content and reduced tendency to hallucinate.
text-davinci-003 is used as a baseline for comparison with GPT-4 in safety metrics.
Used as a comparison point for GPT-4's performance.
extraction_data.application: Chatbots, content generation, and various language tasks
Text generation, language modeling, few-shot learning

extraction_data.innovation: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners
Improving language understanding with generative pre-training

GPT-4 is a large multimodal model accepting image and text inputs, emitting text outputs. It demonstrates improved reliability, creativity, and the ability to handle more nuanced instructions compared to previous models.
extraction_data.application: Text generation, image understanding, question answering

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 is a large multimodal model accepting image and text inputs, emitting text outputs. It demonstrates improved reliability, creativity, and the ability to handle more nuanced instructions compared to previous models.
extraction_data.application: Text generation, image understanding, question answering

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-3.5-Turbo is a cost-effective and faster version of GPT-3.5, optimized for chat applications.
